movie.title: Pearl Harbor (2001) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & ENG] BluRay 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDrive
movie.synopsis: The lifelong friendship between Rafe McCawley and Danny Walker is put to the ultimate test when the two ace fighter pilots become entangled in a love triangle with beautiful Naval nurse Evelyn Johnson. But the rivalry between the friends-turned-foes is immediately put on hold when they find themselves at the center of Japan’s devastating attack on Pearl Harbor on Dec. 7, 1941.
